summary: All advanced basketball stat tracking improvements tested successfully. Spacebar and backslash hotkeys toggle clock, assist dialog appears after made baskets, rebound dialog appears after missed shots and blocks, turnover dialog shows which team gets charged, and possession auto-flips correctly for all scenarios.

minor.issue: Returns 'Clock is not enabled for this game' if clock_enabled is false. Had to enable clock via PUT /api/games/{id} first.

seed_data_creation: Used existing test-advanced-game-001 game with players on floor
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced basketball stat tracking features are fully functional. Test game ID: test-advanced-game-001. Clock must be enabled (clock_enabled: true) for hotkeys to work.

spacebar_hotkey_toggles_clock.description: Pressing spacebar toggles clock between running (green) and stopped (red) states

backslash_hotkey_toggles_clock.description: Pressing backslash key toggles clock between running and stopped states

clock_hint_shows_both_hotkeys.description: Clock area shows '[Space] or [\]' hint text

assist_dialog_after_made_basket.description: After clicking MADE on a 2PT/3PT shot, assist dialog appears with players on floor (excluding shooter) and 'No Assist' option

possession_flips_after_made_basket.description: After made basket and assist selection, possession automatically flips to the other team

rebound_dialog_after_missed_shot.description: After clicking MISSED on a field goal, rebound dialog appears with OREB, DREB, and DEAD options

rebound_dialog_after_block.description: After recording a block, rebound dialog appears with OREB, DREB, DEAD, and Skip options

turnover_dialog_shows_charged_team.description: Turnover dialog shows 'Turnover will be charged to: [Team Name]' based on current possession

possession_flips_after_turnover.description: After both player turnover and team turnover, possession automatically flips to the other team

possession_goes_to_stealer_team.description: After a steal, possession goes to the stealer's team

possession_goes_to_rebounder_team_on_dre.description: After a defensive rebound, possession goes to the rebounding team

test_flow: 3. Test spacebar hotkey - PASS: Clock toggled from stopped to running
4. Test backslash hotkey - PASS: Clock toggled from running to stopped
5. Test made basket flow - PASS: Player select -> Shot result -> Assist dialog -> Possession flip
6. Test missed shot flow - PASS: Player select -> Shot result -> Rebound dialog (OREB/DREB/DEAD)
7. Test block flow - PASS: Player select -> Block recorded -> Rebound dialog appears
8. Test team turnover - PASS: Dialog shows charged team, possession flips after
9. Test player turnover - PASS: Player select -> Turnover recorded -> Possession flips
10. Test steal - PASS: Player select -> Steal recorded -> Possession goes to stealer's team
